query:
SELECT DISTINCT u.companyId, COUNT(u.id) as total_usuarios
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN companies c ON u.companyId = c.id
WHERE u.companyId IS NOT NULL AND u.companyId != ''
  AND c.id IS NULL
GROUP BY u.companyId;
